{{Quote|Suspected of trafficking illicit contraband in Core systems.|Hemphawar's bounty posting by the Senate buearu of Intelligence|<ref name="BH" />}}
'''Stu Hemphawar''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] working in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] during the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. After a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] was placed on his head he and a large number of other death stick dealers he was associated with were captured by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] in [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Biography==
Stu Hempawar was a small time [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] who worked in the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] during the final [[Standard year/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic,]] and by the year [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he had begun doing some work out of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] capital. On Coruscant he became affiliated with two accomplices, [[Oejoe Hitewa]] and [[Ruceba Ahid]], who he took up residence with in a small apartment near the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]]. The trio became implicated in a scheme to traffic a number of illicit goods through out the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and for this the [[Senate Bureau of Intelligence/Legends|Senate Bureau of Intelligence]] placed a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on each of their heads. The bureau offered a reward of 3,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] for the capture of Hempawar alive, but would pay nothing for his [[Death/Legends|death]]. In 32 BBY the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] traveled to Coruscant while trying to track down information on the [[Bando Gora/Legends|Bando Gora]], a secretive cult believed to be involved in the [[Death stick/Legends|Death stick]] trade and lead by the former [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Komari Vosa]]. He started his search by tracking down the Death stick dealer [[Jervis Gloom]] in the entertainment district due to his knowledge about the Death stick trade. Whilst in the Uscru district, Fett encountered Hemphawar, who attempted to flee from the bounty hunter. Fett successfully captured him and also managed to subdue Hitewa and Ahid whilst in the district, claiming all three of the bounties on the smugglers from the bureau of Intelligence.<ref name="CSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Hempawar was a [[Color/Legends|fair]] skinned [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] with black hair which he wore in a pony tail. He also grew a beard and had brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. When he encountered Fett on Coruscant, he attempted to flee from the bounty hunter instead of fighting him, but was unsuccessful.<ref name="BH" />

==Appearances==
